title: Sell through the commercial marketplace
summary: The Microsoft commercial marketplace is a catalog of cloud applications and services that contains offerings from Microsoft and thousands of partners. In this learning path, you'll be introduced to concepts that will help your organization get ready to sell your cloud products and services through the commercial marketplace.

sections.title: Sell through the commercial marketplace
sections.summary: The Microsoft commercial marketplace is a catalog of cloud applications and services that contains offerings from Microsoft and thousands of partners. In this learning path, you'll be introduced to concepts that will help your organization get ready to sell your cloud products and services through the commercial marketplace.

lessons.title: Introduction to the Microsoft commercial marketplace
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the Microsoft commercial marketplace, including Microsoft AppSource, Azure Marketplace, offer types, and Marketplace Rewards.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-commercial-marketplace/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to the Microsoft commercial marketplace

lessons.title: Go to market through the commercial marketplace
lessons.content_md:
This module provides tips and best practices to help organizations create their business plan for success in the commercial marketplace

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/go-to-market-commercial-marketplace/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Go to market through the commercial marketplace

lessons.title: Create a SaaS offer for the commercial marketplace
lessons.content_md:
This module provides a high-level overview of software as a service (SaaS) offers in the commercial marketplace.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-saas-offer-commercial-marketplace/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create a SaaS offer for the commercial marketplace

lessons.title: Create a virtual machine offer for the commercial marketplace
lessons.content_md:
This module provides a high-level overview of VM offers in the commercial marketplace.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-vm-offer-commercial-marketplace/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create a virtual machine offer for the commercial marketplace

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Sell through the commercial marketplace
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Sell through the commercial marketplace**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
